content: INSPIRING LIFESTYLES

The firm specializes in Real Estate Development, Domestic and International Brokerage, Property Management, and Investment Advisory. Premier Choice was founded in 2011 by Amran Zia in Dubai, UAE. The company soon expanded to Islamabad, Pakistan and has been in a phase of hyper-growth ever since. Our client-centric approach combined with industry leading design and process engineering drives us to continuously deliver superior quality developments and services — ensuring collective success for all stakeholders. P R E M I E R C H O I C E I N T E R N A T I O N A L I S K N O W N F O R : OUR COMPANY Today, our firm has extensive operations in: | | | D U B A I N E W Y O R K I S L A M A B A D A L B E R T A | | QUALITY CONTROL EXTENSIVE INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE TIMELY PROJECT DELIVERY

KEY FACTS 5,000,000+ S Q U A R E F E E T O F D E V E L O P M E N T G L O B A L L Y 26+ D E V E L O P M E N T P R O J E C T S 150+ T E A M O F E X P E R T S G L O B A L L Y 13+ C O M P L E T E D P R O J E C T S | |

VERTICALLY INTEGRATED EXPERTS FOR EVERY STEP OF THE VALUE CHAIN OUR SERVICES: STEP 2 Design, Project, & Development Management STEP 3 Rental & Leasing STEP 4 Property & Facilities Management STEP 1 Investment Management

CEO Amran Zia, Founder and CEO of Premier Choice International, has revolutionized the scope of real estate development in every community he has worked in. With a comprehensive background in hospitality and real estate development, Mr. Zia has built on his vision to transform the face of luxury developments through an intricate mix of innovative designs, value add services, and state-of-the-art amenities and facilities. Premier Choice International’s creation and subsequent growth have allowed the organization to build an internationally experienced team of corporate professionals that takes pride in conducting its operations with maximum efficiency and quality. “INTEGRITY IS THE CORNERSTONE OF OUR WORK, VISION, AND SUCCESS. “

EXECUTIVE LEADERSHIP With the creation and subsequent growth of Premier Choice International, the company has established a strong foundation of an internationally experienced corporate team that conduct its operations with maximum efficiency and quality. MAHHAD IMRAN Managing Director Formerly PwC, Dubai, LDA Capital Los Angeles, and KSR, New York. Honors Graduate of UCLA SHAFQAT QADRI Chief Financial Officer Formerly Manager of PwC NY in Audit and International Tax practices , Vice President of Barclays in New York and Toronto. Former Executive Director Arqaam Capital, UAE. 40+ years of experience in CDA, POF, NDC, and NWS Housing Society. A recipient of the Pride of Performance (2002) and Sitara-e-Imtiaz (2013) awards. MOHSIN AGHA Director Projects SYED ADEEL NASIR Sr. Director Business Development Over two decades of Business Development experience in strategic roles with leading real estate and corporate entities including Zameen.com, Ufone, MTBC and J7 Group

EXECUTIVE LEADERSHIP AWAIS QURESHI Director Corporate Relations Former Project Manager at MUC Oil & Gas Engineering Consultancy in Fujairah and TAHTAN General Contracting LLC in Abu Dhabi Over 16 years of experience in multifaceted HR roles with Aga Khan Health Service Pakistan, Uch Power (PVT) Limited, and FWO. MAHWISH NAEEM Head of Human Resources AZHAR AMIN Director Finance Formerly CFO and Finance Director at major listed companies such as FCL, Montgomery, KB & Kami Ventures- USA, Haiwoo and Al Nahar Group UAE FAHAD QURESHI Head of Sales Former McKinsey CRM, Apple ME Expansion Manager, and Faisal Town GM Sales & Marketing, specializing in global growth and market expansion.

INVESTMENT PHILOSOPHY & CORPORATE STRATEGY INDUSTRY LEADING ROI’s LOCAL AND INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT OPTIMIZATION DEMOGRAPHIC, SOCIAL, AND FINANCIAL GROWTH COMMUNITY BUILDING APPROACH COMPLETE, END TO END PROJECT MANAGEMENT ENHANCED LIFESTYLE EXPERIENCE

OUR KEY FOCUS IS VALUE-CREATION Principle of value creation is the process of creating additional value through utilizing research, market leading technologies, investment strategies, advanced processes, innovative design, and competitive pricing. Ultimately our proven experience in abiding by the principle of Value Creation has, and continues to, generate continuous growth for everyone in the Real Estate value chain from investors to tenants. OPTIMIZED DESIGN We use innovative design techniques to create spaces that are functional, efficient, and aesthetically pleasing ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY We are committed to developing sustainable properties that optimize environmental synergy VERTICAL INTEGRATION Our industry-leading in-house expertise for every step of the real estate development process ensures that all of our Projects maintain the highest quality and offer everlasting growth VALUE GENERATING PRICING Our products are competitively priced to maximize value for investors and build everlasting relationships CONTINUOUS QUALITY CONTROL As one of the few ISO 9001 :2015 certified real estate organizations all of our processes and products have multiple layers of strict quality checks and controls

DEVELOPMENT PROJECTS PARTNERS & ASSOCIATED BRANDS

With over a decade of experience in both local and global real estate markets, the team at Premier Choice International has dedicated themselves to establishing and executing procedures that guarantee optimal efficiency and top-notch construction practices. The ISO 9001:2015 certification is a testament to our commitment to providing superior quality solutions and ensuring client satisfaction. We are proud to have achieved this certification, which has earned us international recognition for our endeavors to become the largest and most reputable developer in the region. CERTIFICATION ISO 9001:2015 Certified for Success

At Premier Hospitality, our commitment to hospitality extends beyond providing mere accommodation; we strive to elevate your investment or stay to new heights. In the realm of investments, Premier Hospitality offers a lucrative opportunity by managing your property with a seasoned team deeply rooted in the hospitality industry. With our extensive experience in hotel management, we ensure that your investment yields optimal returns. We understand the nuances of the real estate and hospitality market in both Pakistan and the UAE, enabling us to navigate challenges and capitalize on opportunities. HOSPITALITY PREMIER NAWAZ MEHMOOD Executive Director An executive leader with more than 32 years of experience across three continents including Australia, Middle East and Africa in business development, executive coaching and establishing lifestyle destinations. Mr Nawaz is a seasoned C- Suite executive having experience in senior leadership roles at Hyatt and Caesar’s palace AMRAN ZIA CEO Amran Zia, our CEO, a graduate of Alpina School of Hotel Management in Switzerland has always dreamed about filling the gap between real estate, innovation, and hospitality. With Real Estate as his core focus for the past 21 years, he has established an internationally experienced corporate team that carries out its operations with maximum efficiency and quality. With Premier Hospitality's On-Demand Services Model, we ensure that clients economize their Serviced Living by having the choice of which services fit their needs best. This provides you with exactly those Services that you want and Saves you from the cost of unnecessary additions! PROFESSIONALLY EXPERIENCED FROM:

We follow brand guidelines, not rigid standards, fostering flexibility and collaboration in each project. OUR PHILOSOPHY We transform hospitality concepts into tangible, community-built destinations with a contemporary aesthetic A single operator responsible for each concept's overall performance in mixed-use development. We optimize costs and space for investor returns, creating versatile, functional, and social spaces benefiting local communities.

We pride ourselves on innovation. We leverage cutting-edge technologies and industry best practices to deliver solutions that enhance the overall effectiveness and sustainability of the facilities under our management. Our commitment to excellence extends to creating an environment that not only meets but exceeds the expectations of our clients, providing them with facilities that are not only well-maintained but also contribute positively to their operational success. In premier facilities management are a testament to our dedication, expertise, and continuous pursuit of excellence in creating optimal, sustainable, and high-performing environments for our clients. FACILITIES MANAGEMENT PREMIER

Our Team Dedicated to elevating guest experiences and maintaining seamless operations, our team combines expertise in customer service and meticulous facility upkeep to create environments that exceed expectations. With a passion for excellence, we ensure every detail is perfected to deliver unparalleled service and comfort. IMRAN KIYANI Property Facilitation Manager- Pakistan Previously worked with Emaar Pakistan and Al Asmakh Facilities Management. His expertise in Asset Management, Risk Management, and Customer Management is a valuable addition to our team. MOHAMMAD JIBRAN Property Manager Experienced professional with a background in real estate, retail and operations having worked with Carphone Warehouse (UK), Rock Fall Property Solutions (Qatar) and FF Steel (PAK)

Developed as part of Al-Tajir Real Estate, Fortunato is a residential complex offering a full scale of amenities ranging from gym and swimming pool to 24/7 security Status: Completed In 2014 650,000 SQ. FT. JUMEIRAH VILLAGE CIRCLE, DUBAI FORTUNATO 5 FLOORS

With Stettler Crossroads, Premier Choice International marked its presence in Canada. Located in the prime of Alberta, the strip mall houses various shopping outlets to facilitate all your necessities! 150,000 SQ.FT. STETTLER, AB, CANADA STETTLER CROSSROADS

River Hills 1 is a multi-story residential apartment building located on a hilltop next to Clock Tower roundabout in Bahria Town Phase 7. Overlooking Soan River and with its stunning mountainous view, River Hills 1 has cemented itself as the premier apartment building in Bahria Town, Islamabad. 165,000 SQ.FT. BAHRIA TOWN PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD RIVER HILLS 1 LG + G + 9 FLOORS

Following the initial success of our River Hills 1 project, we decided to fulfill the extraordinary demand for our residential apartments in Bahria Town Phase 7 by launching River Hills 2. The project mirrors the conceptual theme employed in River Hills 1 with key value-addition modifications to make it a superior rental and investment opportunity. 55,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA TOWN PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD RIVER HILLS 2 LG + G + 8 + PENTHOUSE

Staying true to our River Hills theme, we launched River Hills 3 shortly after successful launch of River Hills 2 . This apartment building is part of the same complex as River Hills 1 and 2. Mirroring River Hills 1 and 2, the project has 9 floors of residential space with 2 commercial floors. Save Mart and other necessities are located just few steps away. 60,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA TOWN PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD RIVER HILLS 3 LG + G + 9 FLOORS

The River Hills community grows further with the launch and development of River Hills 4. Building on the comfortable lifestyle River Hills takes pride in, this expansion offers an identical scale of amenities and facilities. With complete Facilities Management by Premier Choice International, swift access to Save Mart and other necessities, and round-the-clock security, River Hills 4 guarantees an incomparable living experience. 63,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA TOWN PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD RIVER HILLS 4 LG + G + 9 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE

To develop the River Hills community further, we have recently launched River Hills 5. The apartment building is located in DHA Phase 1 and is an upgradation of our River Hills concept where we are providing you with improved facilities and amenities to elevate your lifestyle. It is located walking distance from our success stories of River Hills 1, 2, 3, and 4. 200,000 SQ. FT. DHA PHASE 1, SECTOR-F, ISLAMABAD RIVER HILLS 5 3B + G + 12 + PENTHOUSE
ON SITE IMAGE

Our flagship project, Box Park, has been the reason behind Bahria's new Food Street changing its name! Box Park is a strip mall with major food outlets, shopping brands, and entertainment facilities. The project features a Corniche Walk on its Soan river-facing side. 130,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA FOOD STREET, PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD BOX PARK LG + G + M + 3 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE

River Loft is a luxuriously spaced out apartment complex made up of 6 buildings. With a special focus on high-end construction and finishing quality, the project complements its geographic location with ample private parks, superior views, 24/7 security, and numerous commercial facilities nearby. 252,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA INTELLECTUAL VILLAGE, ISLAMABAD RIVER LOFT G + 3 + PENTHOUSE
ON SITE IMAGE

Drawing on majestic architectural inspirations from Ancient Rome and neoclassical Paris, Roman Grove 1 is a luxury residential and commercial development. The project will feature boutique shops, dining outlets, proximity to offices and clinics, and will feature handcrafted columns and façade work. 90,000 SQ. FT. DHA PHASE 1, SECTOR F, ISLAMABAD ROMAN GROVE I LG + G + 3 + PENTHOUSE
ON SITE IMAGE

Building on the architectural intricacies of Roman Grove 1, the extension offers premium commercial spaces for valuable opportunities. Roman Grove 2 is a commercial development by Premier Choice International that is set to provide space for high-end clinics and office development. Located in the prime of DHA Phase 1, Sector F, the development offers a vast scope for corporate growth. 30,000 SQ. FT. DHA PHASE 1, SECTOR F, ISLAMABAD ROMAN GROVE II LG + G + 3 + PENTHOUSE
ON SITE IMAGE T O W E R 1 & 2

Staying true to our theme of contemporary luxury retail and dining, Premier Choice is currently developing 68 High Street. The project will feature exclusive Dine-In and Take Away Restaurants, a river facing Corniche Walk, and a variety of retail outlets for your shopping and entertainment needs. 200,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA FOOD STREET, PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD 68 HIGH STREET LG + G + M + 4 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE

With Grand Gallery’s introduction, we have demonstrated the continuation of our work in building the ultimate shopping and dining destinations for our community. Grand Gallery is a luxury shopping destination located on Bahria Food Street, nestled between our iconic commercial developments Box Park 1 and 68 High Street. With this project, Premier Choice is also providing the extension of its landmark Corniche Walk 30,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA FOOD STREET, PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD GRAND GALLERY LG + G + M + 3 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE
68 HIGH STREET GRAND GALLERY BOX PARK NORTH PAKISTAN’S FIRST CORNICHE WALK
68 HIGH STREET GRAND GALLERY BOX PARK
River Side View

Committed to bringing the best of the world to Pakistan, Premier Choice introduces River Courtyard. This project is a 14 story ultra-luxury high-rise development featuring Permanent Residency, Serviced Apartments, and a full suite of amenities and services. Our project is fully licensed by world renowned hotel operator, Wyndham’s Ramada, to bring the first internationally approved Serviced Apartments to Pakistan. 450,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA INTELLECTUAL VILLAGE, ISLAMABAD RIVER COURTYARD 2B + LG + G + 15 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE
ON SITE IMAGE
Serviced Apartment

Buraq Heights is a luxurious Resort-Style Development containing Residential Serviced-Apartments with a full suite of amenities and services that will leave you buzzing with immense excitement. Buraq Heights is managed by Premier Hospitality, a brainchild of our CEO, where the focus lies on services that matter the most to you. The complete team is up-to-par with the international standards of hospitality that do not compare to anything, anywhere in Pakistan. 200,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA INTELLECTUAL VILLAGE, ISLAMABAD BURAQ HEIGHTS 2B + G + 11 + PENTHOUSE
ON SITE IMAGE

An Extension to our iconic development River Courtyard, this architectural marvel will house serviced and residential units continuing on Premier Choice's mission to transform Premier River Front into a Resort-Style living destination in the emerging urban heart of the Twin Cities. 400,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA INTELLECTUAL VILLAGE, ISLAMABAD RIVER COURTYARD II 3B + G + 18 + AMENITIES FLOOR
BURAQ HEIGHTS RIVER COURTYARD I RIVER COURTYARD II

Premier Choice has launched its move into Bahria Town Phase 8 with Spring Arch. Spring Arch is set to be the residential highlight of Bahria Town Phase 8’s Commercial District. At Spring Arch, premier living is complemented by outstanding connectivity with fast access to Bahria Food Street, DHA, and the new Ring Road. Building on our concept of creating sleek and innovative community spaces with end-user requirements close to our hearts. 80,000 SQ. FT. DISTRICT COMMERCIAL, BAHRIA PHASE 8, ISLAMABAD SPRING ARCH LG + G + 8 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE

By introducing a concept of spacious vertical living in the heart of the ultra-luxury Al Barari community, Premier Choice has once again displayed its ability to recognize growth markets and create growth opportunities for all participants of the Real Estate Industry, from development investors to future rental tenants. 56,000 SQ. FT. MAJAN, AL BARARI, DUBAI BARARI VIEWS LIMITED G + 6 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE
MODEL APARTMENT

Box Park II is the latest commercial development launched by Premier Choice International based on the successful model of Box Park 1. Located in the prime of Bahria Town Phase 7, Islamabad, Box Park 2 will provide superior commercial spaces for you to live, work, and shop in. 30,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA FOOD STREET, PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD BOX PARK II LG + G + M + 3 FLOORS
ON SITE IMAGE

After the commercial success of Box Park I and II, Premier Choice International is now developing Box Park III. Located in the prime of Bahria Town Phase 7, the development is set to offer prime spaces for commercial and corporate activity. With excellent connectivity, proximity to all major landmarks, and complete facilities management by Premier Choice International, the development will be a commercial highlight in Bahria Town Phase 7, Islamabad! 20,000 SQ. FT. BAHRIA PHASE 7, ISLAMABAD BOX PARK III G1 + G2 + M + 3 FLOORS

Gateway JVC is a Mix-Use Development with a focus on lifestyle featuring a dedicated Co-working Area, an infinity pool with views of Emirates Living and Marina, a host of amenities catered towards children and families coupled with a rooftop terrace, open air cinema, and the highest Padel Tennis Court in Dubai! Located in close proximity to Al Khail Road in JVC, Gateway is a technology driven development featuring home automation, Amazon Alexa integration, automated and human-free grocery store along with other technologically driven features to bolster your lifestyle experience in your residential environment. 300,000 SQ. FT. JUMEIRAH VILLAGE CIRCLE, DUBAI GATEWAY G + 4P + 11 + ROOFTOP RECREATIONAL AREA
ON SITE IMAGE
CONCEPT IN HEART OF NEW COMMERCIAL HUB OF DUBAI I N T RO D U C I N G S E R I E S
NEW WAY TO LIVE | WORK | REJUVENATE | PLAY

South Lofts I is a purely residential development thoughtfully designed for a new generation of urban living. Created for young professionals and modern lifestyles in mind, the building offers over 26,000 sq. ft. of dedicated lifestyle amenities, seamlessly blending wellness, fitness, and community living. The project features an infinity pool, indoor and outdoor gyms, a Padel tennis court, a curated wellness zone, a vibrant co- working space, and a dedicated jogging track, enabling residents to maintain a balanced, active, and social lifestyle without leaving home. 120,000+ SQ.FT. DUBAI SOUTH SOUTH LOFTS I

South Lofts II represents the next chapter in contemporary residential living. Developed as a purely residential building, it is designed for young professionals and modern urban lifestyles, with a strong focus on wellness, fitness, and community interaction. South Lofts II reflects an evolving residential vision, with future developments already underway, continuing the South Lofts journey beyond this phase. 135,000+ SQ.FT. DUBAI SOUTH SOUTH LOFTS II II

The next urban living, shopping, dining, and working destination of the twin cities. Premier Choice International is undertaking the development of the largest commercial and residential hub of the twin cities in the heart of DHA Phase 1, Islamabad. Combining sleek and modern vertical living options with high- end malls and commercial outlets, Orchard Boulevard is set to redefine community development in Pakistan. 4,000,000+ SQ.FT. DHA PHASE 1, ISLAMABAD ORCHARD BOULEVARD

The Mall will feature high-end dining and retail options. The facility is equipped with industry-leading amenities and facilities. GRAND ORCHARD DHA 1,000,000+ SQ.FT.
